mapper.select: select F.FILE_NO ,F.ORIGINAL_NAME ,F.FILE_SIZE ,F.SAVED_AT ,F.EXPIRE_ON ,CD.DOC_TYPE from FILE_INFO F right join COMPANY_DOC CD on(CD.FILE_NO = F.FILE_NO) where CD.COMPANY_UUID = #{companyUuid} and F.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

select F.ORIGINAL_NAME ,F.MIME ,F.SAVE_PATH from FILE_INFO F left join COMPANY_DOC CD on (CD.FILE_NO = F.FILE_NO) left join COMPANY C on (C.COMPANY_NO = CD.COMPANY_NO) where F.FILE_NO = #{docNo} amd C.COMPANY_UUID = #{companyUuid} and F.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
select ORIGINAL_NAME ,SAVE_PATH from FILE_INFO where FILE_NO = #{fileNo}
